review_gate_note: 주인님 지시로 모든 후보를 임시 O 처리했고, 추가로 앞머리와 양팔도 강제 production 후보로 승격했다. 이 결과는 Cubism import 기술 smoke PASS이며, 파츠 품질 최종 승인이나 리깅 품질 PASS는 아니다.
known_quality_risks: front_hair is a forced extraction from the canonical image because the original See-through front hair layer was zero-alpha.
L_arm and R_arm are forced from See-through handwear-r/l outputs and may represent sleeves/arm-side silhouette rather than clean anatomical arms.
mouth_line is accepted only by forced-all-O pipeline progress, not by final visual quality review.
clothes, neck, hair, and face boundaries still need quality review before serious ArtMesh/Deformer work.
This smoke only proves that the PSD can be opened by Cubism as separate parts.
notes: Cubism Editor 5.3.01 opened the rebuilt import_ready_candidate.psd.
The left Parts panel shows individual layer entries including front_hair, L_arm, and R_arm, so the PSD was not flattened.
PSD metadata check found RGB 8-bit canvas and 19 concrete PSD child layers.
This is a forced MVP pass for pipeline progression, not a final art-quality pass.
